/services.title: Services - Blue Horizon Holistic's
/services.description: Each new client receives a free consultation before treatment
h2: Join Our Community for Exclusive Wellness Insights and Updates!
p: Each new client receives a free consultation before treatment

A Master Healer in the art of Reiki – Universal Life. James has had 10+ years’ experience in the art originating from Japan. Aura work in the energy that surrounds and flows through us that causes stress, imbalance and discomfort. Working with/without crystals depending on each individual, you will leave feeling stress free, relaxed and like a new person.1 hour - £4030 min - £30

Experience the ultimate in therapeutic healing with our Holistic Deep Tissue Massage and/or Reiki—a powerful yet mindful approach to releasing deep-seated tension, improving circulation, and restoring balance to your body and mind.

Unlock your body’s full potential with our specialised Sports Massage therapy. Whether you’re an athlete, fitness enthusiast, or simply experiencing muscle tension from daily activities, sports massage helps improve flexibility, prevent injuries, and promote faster recovery.

Find deep relaxation and emotional harmony with Reiki Energy Healing. This gentle, hands-on healing technique helps clear blocked energy, reduce stress, and promote holistic well-being. Whether you’re seeking emotional balance, spiritual connection, or overall relaxation, Reiki provides a calming and transformative experience.

Melt away tension and restore calm with our deeply relaxing Indian Head Massage. This traditional therapy focuses on the scalp, neck, and shoulders — helping to relieve stress, ease headaches, and promote better sleep. Ideal for anyone needing a mental reset or some well-deserved time out.

Experience the healing power of movement with our Thai Yoga Massage. Blending acupressure, stretching, and assisted yoga poses, this treatment boosts flexibility, relieves muscular tension, and encourages energy flow throughout the body. Perfect for anyone seeking a deeper body–mind connection.
Guiding you towards balance, healing, and a brighter future
Room 7, 17 Market Street, Lichfield, Staffordshire, WS13 6JX

/about-us.title: About Us - Blue Horizon Holistic's
/about-us.description: At Blue Horizon we blend the art of holistic massage with the gentle power of Reiki to create a deeply restorative experience for the body, mind and spirit.
h2: Take the next step and schedule an appointment today
Join Our Community for Exclusive Wellness Insights and Updates!
p: At Blue Horizon we blend the art of holistic massage with the gentle power of Reiki to create a deeply restorative experience for the body, mind and spirit.

At Blue Horizon Holistics, we believe in the power of holistic healing to nurture the mind, body, and spirit. Our mission is to provide a serene environment where individuals can reconnect with their inner selves and achieve lasting wellness.
Hi, I'm James – a holistic therapist with a deep passion for helping people reconnect with themselves—body, mind, and spirit.

Before becoming a therapist, I worked in family support for 12 years. During that time, I witnessed many families struggle, and it inspired me to help people on a deeper, more personal level. As a father, I also came to understand that my own wellbeing directly influences the wellbeing of my daughters—and that real change starts from within.

In 2016, a transformative trip to Peru led me to a spiritual healer who helped me do some powerful inner work. She told me that my path was to learn different ways of healing and eventually teach others too. This message stayed with me.

At the time, I was already a qualified Reiki therapist. I followed that calling and became a Reiki Master. I soon realised that people often need support in more than one area—so I expanded my practice by training in massage therapy, specialising in sports and deep tissue techniques.

Today, I bring together physical, emotional, and energetic healing to help clients feel more balanced, grounded, and empowered. I’m a registered member of the Federation of Holistic Therapists (FHT) and I’m always learning, growing, and deepening my skills to support those I work with.
See what others are saying about their healing journey.
Guiding you towards balance, healing, and a brighter future
Room 7, 17 Market Street, Lichfield, Staffordshire, WS13 6JX

h1: Heal, grow and thrive with Reiki and Holistic Massage
h2: Experience the Benefits of Holistic Therapy for Mind and Body​
Join Our Community for Exclusive Wellness Insights and Updates!
p: Welcome to Blue Horizon Holistics, where your well-being is our priority. Experience the healing power of massage and Reiki, designed to restore balance and harmony in your life.
Whether you're recovering from an injury, dealing with stress, or simply in need of a reset, our services will leave you feeling lighter, calmer, and more aligned.
A Loving Space for Healing and Growth
At Blue Horizon Holistics, we offer a serene escape from daily stress. Our expert therapies promote well-being and rejuvenation, tailored to your unique needs.
Whether through life coaching, Reiki, or healing sessions, James guides you with compassion, helping you embrace your true potential.

A Master Healer in the art of Reiki – Universal Life. James has had 10+ years’ experience in the art originating from Japan. Aura work in the energy that surrounds and flows through us that causes stress, imbalance and discomfort. Working with/without crystals depending on each individual, you will leave feeling stress free, relaxed and like a new person.1 hour - £4030 min - £30

Unlike a traditional deep tissue massage, our holistic method integrates intuitive touch, breathwork, and energy awareness to promote overall well-being. This treatment is perfect for those seeking relief from chronic pain, stress, or muscle tightness while nurturing their body’s natural healing process.

Unlock your body’s full potential with our specialised Sports Massage therapy. Whether you’re an athlete, fitness enthusiast, or simply experiencing muscle tension from daily activities, sports massage helps improve flexibility, prevent injuries, and promote faster recovery.
At Blue Horizon Holistics, we offer a serene escape through our expert therapies. Discover how our holistic approach promotes relaxation, rejuvenation, and overall well-being.
Our therapies help reduce stress and create a profound sense of calm.
Experience significant relief from muscle tension and chronic pain through our tailored treatments.
Guiding you towards balance, healing, and a brighter future
Room 7, 17 Market Street, Lichfield, Staffordshire, WS13 6JX
